reasoning: Confirmed lot of the three-lot listing assemblage. The operator supplied the Travis CAD property-detail link for geographic ID 226623; resolve_place geocodes the situs address to a placeKey and get_place_layers returns the parcel layer. This atom is the anchor lot; the two sibling lots (607, 609 Nelray) are resolved through the same place/parcel substrate path and carry baseline confidence pending operator confirmation.
